input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.4.2
            TITLE: the only allowed sequence of components are the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.4.2: The only allowed sequence of components are the following:
IC.2.4.2 The only allowed sequence of components are the following:  
a. For naturally aspirated engines, the sequence must be: throttle body, restrictor, and 
engine. 
b. For turbocharged or supercharged engines, the sequence must be: restrictor, 
compressor, throttle body, engine.

final_answer: rule IC.2.4.2: The only allowed sequence of components are the following: IC.2.4.2 The only allowed sequence of components are the following: a. For naturally aspirated engines, the sequence must be: throttle body, restrictor, and engine. b. For turbocharged or supercharged engines, the sequence must be: restrictor, compressor, throttle body, engine.
